actions: Rollback to v3.1. Scale pool 50 → 100 cushion. Add pool monitor alert > 80%.
results.reasoning: Matched with historical incident INC-2025-11-08 (similarity: 0.80). Summary: Payment-svc v3.2 deploy at 09:42 leak DB pool. Pool 50/50 used trong 5 phút. Downstream checkout cascade. Notification queue backed up.
